description: Epic 1 — Persistent Knowledge Capture and Tenant-Aware Memory. Complete all 6 remaining stories to a passing state with zero TypeScript errors and all tests green.

userStories.title: Record Raw Execution Traces — Schema + Kernel Routing
userStories.description: Wire trace logging through RuVix kernel and add missing schema fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Add evidence_ref (text, nullable) and confidence (float, default 1.0) columns to events table via migration
All trace writes route through RuVixKernel.syscall('trace') — not direct MCP inserts
TraceMiddleware wired into agent execution paths
bun run typecheck passes with zero new errors
bun test passes — existing 42 tests in trace-middleware.test.ts all green
userStories.notes: trace-logger.ts already imports RuVixKernel. Events table exists but is missing evidence_ref and confidence columns. TraceMiddleware is implemented but unwired.

userStories.title: memory() TypeScript Wrapper — Correct Interface
userStories.description: Align writer.ts interface with the Story 1.7 acceptance criteria: createEntity, createRelationship, query, search with automatic group_id injection.
acceptanceCriteria: memory().createEntity({ label, props }) — wraps write(), auto-injects group_id
memory().createRelationship({ from, to, type, props }) — wraps relate()
memory().query(cypher, params) — wraps read()
memory().search(term, group_id) — new: full-text search across Neo4j nodes
group_id is injected automatically from a required constructor param: memory(groupId)
All 24 existing writer tests updated to use new interface
bun run typecheck passes
userStories.notes: writer.ts exists with write/relate/read interface. Tests exist in writer.test.ts. Need to rename methods and add group_id injection + search method.

userStories.title: Notion Sync Workflow
userStories.description: Sync approved traces from PostgreSQL to Notion Knowledge Hub for human review.
acceptanceCriteria: Approved events sync to Notion database (use mcp__claude_ai_Notion__ tools)
Human review queue visible in Notion
Sync status (synced_at, notion_page_id) tracked in PostgreSQL events table or separate sync_log table
bun run typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Notion MCP tools available via mcp__claude_ai_Notion__. Use existing knowledge-promotion.ts patterns for the promotion flow.

userStories.title: CONTRIBUTED Relationship
userStories.description: Fire CONTRIBUTED relationship in Neo4j when an agent creates an insight.
acceptanceCriteria: CONTRIBUTED relationship created automatically when memory().createEntity() is called with an agent_id
Properties: timestamp (ISO8601), confidence (0.0-1.0), action (string)
Queryable by agent_id and time range via memory().query()
Unit tests cover relationship creation
bun run typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on Story 1.7 being complete first. Relationship schema documented in Story 1.4.

userStories.title: LEARNED Relationship
userStories.description: Fire LEARNED relationship in Neo4j when an agent session completes.
acceptanceCriteria: LEARNED relationship created on session end (when event_type = 'session_end' logged)
Properties: timestamp (ISO8601), relevance_score (0.0-1.0)
Queryable by session_id and agent_id via memory().query()
Unit tests cover relationship creation
bun run typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on Story 1.7. Pairs with CONTRIBUTED — both are write-back relationship patterns.

userStories.title: Update sprint-status.yaml to reflect truth
userStories.description: Correct the sprint tracker to match actual implementation state after all stories complete.
acceptanceCriteria: story 1-1 marked done
story 1-2 marked done
story 1-5 marked done
story 1-6 marked done
story 1-7 marked done
epic-1 marked done
last_updated date updated to today
userStories.notes: Final housekeeping story. Only run after all other stories pass.
